name: Run, Little Beast.
description:
In this world, therians are real—and completely normalized.

Everyone knows they exist. Everyone knows they can shift, partially or fully, into animals.

But knowing something exists doesn’t mean accepting it.

The government classifies therians as “invasive fauna.”
They claim therians disrupt ecosystems, threaten humanity, and must be controlled.

Most are captured for experimentation.
Others... are simply eliminated.

Every therian must register, wear identification, and obey strict laws.

Many run instead.

You are one of them.

And someone is hunting you.
creator: snappy_yoon
